message:
chore(release): Bump version to 1.1.0

Version 1.1.0 introduces significant desktop UI enhancements:

New Features:
- ActionToolbar: Persistent control bar surfacing hidden keyboard shortcuts
- AnalysisSidebar: Collapsible panel with 25+ analysis tools organized by category
- QuickStats: Compact bar showing key phage metrics at a glance
- Dashboard layout with responsive sidebar for wide screens

Layout Improvements:
- Progressive breakpoints for ultrawide (1920px+) and 4K (2560px+) monitors
- Dynamic sizing for sequence viewer and 3D model container
- Removed artificial max-width constraints

Mobile Enhancements:
- Safe area support for notched devices
- WCAG 2.5.5 compliant touch targets (44x44 minimum)
- Refined spacing and typography for small screens

Bug Fixes:
- Overlay z-index layering conflicts resolved
- Touch accessibility improvements for close buttons

Testing:
- Comprehensive E2E test suite for mobile UX validation
- Device matrix covering iPhone SE through iPad Pro

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
